name: IdsEdwOpsSupvrDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH main AS (SELECT OPS_SUPVR.OPS_SUPVR_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK'))='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') END AS SRC_SYS_CD, OPS_SUPVR.OPS_SUPVR_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, OPS_SUPVR.OPS_DRCTR_SK, OPS_SUPVR.OPS_SUPVR_NM, OPS_SUPVR.USER_ID, OPS_SUPVR.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.OPS_SUPVR OPS_SUPVR LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON OPS_SUPVR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE OPS_SUPVR.OPS_DRCTR_SK <> 0 AND OPS_SUPVR.OPS_DRCTR_SK <> 1), one_unk AS (SELECT 0 AS OPS_SUPVR_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS OPS_SUPVR_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS OPS_DRCTR_SK, 'UNK' AS OPS_SUPVR_NM, 'UNK' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), one_na AS (SELECT 1 AS OPS_SUPVR_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS OPS_SUPVR_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS OPS_DRCTR_SK, 'NA' AS OPS_SUPVR_NM, 'NA' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM main UNION ALL SELECT * FROM one_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM one_na
